requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 and COPANIT / DGNTI Conformity as the Expected Technical Baseline for Panama BESS Projects
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619及COPANIT / DGNTI合格评定作为巴拿马BESS项目预期技术基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619及COPANIT / DGNTI合格評定作為巴拿馬BESS項目預期技術基準

summary.en: Panama's national standards body is the Dirección General de Normas y Tecnología Industrial (DGNTI), operating under the Ministry of Commerce and Industry (MICI). Panama participates in the COPANIT (Comisión Panameña de Normas Industriales y Técnicas) national standards committee process. Panama's product conformity framework is still developing for emerging technologies such as stationary BESS; a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation equivalent to a mandatory pre-market certification regime had not been identified from official sources as of the dataset date. Panama's standards system is principally aligned with IEC international standards, and IEC 62619 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the internationally expected safety standard for lithium BESS cells and modules. Panama BESS project owners, EPCs, financial institutions, and ASEP / distributor interconnection agreements for commercial and industrial storage projects are expected to reference IEC 62619 compliance and IEC 62133 (for smaller battery modules) as a technical prerequisite. IEC 62933-5-2 is the expected system-level electrochemical safety standard referenced in utility-scale project specifications. Exporters should verify current DGNTI / COPANIT mandatory product notification or conformity requirements directly with DGNTI before shipment.
summary.zh: 巴拿马国家标准机构为工业规范与技术总局（DGNTI），隶属于商业与工业部（MICI）。巴拿马参与COPANIT（巴拿马工业和技术规范委员会）全国标准委员会流程。巴拿马的产品合格评定框架对于固定式BESS等新兴技术仍在发展完善中；截至本数据集日期，尚未从官方来源确认与强制上市前认证制度相当的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规。巴拿马标准体系主要与IEC国际标准接轨，IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）是锂BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全标准。巴拿马BESS项目业主、EPC承包商、金融机构及ASEP/配电公司商业和工业储能项目并网协议，预计将以IEC 62619合规（较小型电池模组还包括IEC 62133）作为技术前提。IEC 62933-5-2是公用事业规模项目规格中引用的预期系统级电化学安全标准。出口商在出货前应直接向DGNTI核实现行DGNTI/COPANIT强制产品通报或合格评定要求。
summary.zht: 巴拿馬國家標準機構為工業規範與技術總局（DGNTI），隸屬於商業與工業部（MICI）。巴拿馬參與COPANIT（巴拿馬工業和技術規範委員會）全國標準委員會流程。巴拿馬的產品合格評定框架對於固定式BESS等新興技術仍在發展完善中；截至本數據集日期，尚未從官方來源確認與強制上市前認證制度相當的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規。巴拿馬標準體系主要與IEC國際標準接軌，IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）是鋰BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全標準。巴拿馬BESS項目業主、EPC承包商、金融機構及ASEP/配電公司商業和工業儲能項目併網協議，預計將以IEC 62619合規（較小型電池模組還包括IEC 62133）作為技術前提。IEC 62933-5-2是公用事業規模項目規格中引用的預期系統級電化學安全標準。出口商在出貨前應直接向DGNTI核實現行DGNTI/COPANIT強制產品通報或合格評定要求。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety in Panama project specifications)
IEC 62133 — Safety Requirements for Portable Sealed Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries (applicable to smaller battery modules where relevant)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (system-level safety standard expected in utility-scale project specifications)

DGNTI (Dirección General de Normas y Tecnología Industrial) / COPANIT — Panama's national standards body under MICI; verify current regulated-product list and any mandatory conformity notification requirements directly with DGNTI before shipment
Secretaría Nacional de Energía (SNE) — verify any emerging BESS-specific policy or conformity requirements with SNE

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in EES. These Chinese standards are not accepted as equivalents to IEC 62619 in Panama project specifications. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电化学储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。上述中国标准不被巴拿马项目规格接受为IEC 62619的等效依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619测试证据。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電化學儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。上述中國標準不被巴拿馬項目規格接受為IEC 62619的等效依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619測試證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)

gap.en: Critical gap: Panama project owners, EPCs, and ASEP / distributor interconnection agreements reference IEC 62619 as the expected safety evidence for BESS cells and modules. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes in Panama project technical specifications. Exporters should: (a) verify the current DGNTI / COPANIT regulated-product list and any mandatory conformity notification obligation with DGNTI before shipment; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules supplied to Panama BESS projects; (c) confirm the applicable IEC 62619 edition and any IEC 62933-5-2 system-level requirements referenced in the project specification or ASEP / distributor interconnection agreement before committing to a test programme; (d) note that Panama's emerging solar and BESS storage sector growth means project lenders and international EPCs may impose additional IEC evidence requirements not yet reflected in DGNTI mandatory regulations.
gap.zh: 关键差距：巴拿马项目业主、EPC承包商及ASEP/配电公司并网协议将IEC 62619作为BESS电芯和模组的预期安全证据。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未与IEC 62619协调，不被巴拿马项目技术规格接受为替代依据。出口商应：（a）在出货前向DGNTI核实现行DGNTI/COPANIT受监管产品清单及任何强制合格评定通报义务；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至巴拿马BESS项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（c）在启动测试计划前确认项目规格或ASEP/配电公司并网协议中引用的IEC 62619版本及任何IEC 62933-5-2系统级要求；（d）注意巴拿马新兴太阳能和BESS储能行业的增长意味着项目贷款方和国际EPC承包商可能提出DGNTI强制法规尚未涵盖的额外IEC证据要求。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：巴拿馬項目業主、EPC承包商及ASEP/配電公司併網協議將IEC 62619作為BESS電芯和模組的預期安全證據。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未與IEC 62619協調，不被巴拿馬項目技術規格接受為替代依據。出口商應：（a）在出貨前向DGNTI核實現行DGNTI/COPANIT受監管產品清單及任何強制合格評定通報義務；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至巴拿馬BESS項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（c）在啟動測試計畫前確認項目規格或ASEP/配電公司併網協議中引用的IEC 62619版本及任何IEC 62933-5-2系統級要求；（d）注意巴拿馬新興太陽能和BESS儲能行業的增長意味著項目貸款方和國際EPC承包商可能提出DGNTI強制法規尚未涵蓋的額外IEC證據要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice where ASEP / distributor interconnection agreements or project-owner specifications require IEC 62619 compliance; DGNTI / COPANIT mandatory regulatory obligation for BESS had not been confirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with DGNTI
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard (GB designation) for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary

source.publisher: Dirección General de Normas y Tecnología Industrial (DGNTI) / MICI, Panama

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation has been identified for Panama as of the dataset date; however, IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in Panama project specifications and ASEP / distributor interconnection agreements. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient for Panama project acceptance. Verify DGNTI / COPANIT current regulated-product scope and confirm IEC 62619 evidence requirements with the project owner, ASEP, the relevant distributor, and any appointed conformity assessment body before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，巴拿马尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规；然而，IEC 62619是巴拿马项目规格和ASEP/配电公司并网协议中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足巴拿马项目验收要求。出货前请核实DGNTI/COPANIT现行受监管产品范围，并向项目业主、ASEP、相关配电公司及任何指定合格评定机构确认IEC 62619证据要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，巴拿馬尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規；然而，IEC 62619是巴拿馬項目規格和ASEP/配電公司併網協議中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足巴拿馬項目驗收要求。出貨前請核實DGNTI/COPANIT現行受監管產品範圍，並向項目業主、ASEP、相關配電公司及任何指定合格評定機構確認IEC 62619證據要求。
